mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ar.business_type AS businessType, ar.business_id AS businessId, ar.approver_id AS approverId, ar.approval_result AS approvalResult, ar.approval_opinion AS approvalOpinion, ar.approval_time AS approvalTime, ar.create_time AS createTime, ee.name AS approverName FROM approval_record ar LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON ar.approver_id = ee.id WHERE ar.business_type = #{businessType} AND ar.business_id = #{businessId} ORDER BY ar.create_time ASC
SELECT sr.role_code FROM sys_user_role sur JOIN sys_role sr ON sur.role_id = sr.id WHERE sur.user_id = #{userId}

choose.when: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT er.id, er.report_no AS reportNo, 'EXPENSE' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, er.total_amount AS amount, er.expense_type AS expenseType, er.description, er.status, er.create_time AS createTime FROM expense_report er LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON er.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE er.status IN ('PENDING', 'MANAGER_APPROVED') UNION ALL SELECT la.id, la.leave_no AS reportNo, 'LEAVE' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, la.days AS amount, NULL AS expenseType, la.reason AS description, la.status, la.create_time AS createTime FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON la.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE la.status = 'PENDING' UNION ALL SELECT oa.id, oa.overtime_no AS reportNo, 'OVERTIME' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, oa.hours AS amount, NULL AS expenseType, oa.reason AS description, oa.status, oa.create_time AS createTime FROM overtime_application oa LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON oa.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE oa.status = 'PENDING' ) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT er.id, er.report_no AS reportNo, 'EXPENSE' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, er.total_amount AS amount, er.expense_type AS expenseType, er.description, er.status, er.create_time AS createTime FROM expense_report er LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON er.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE er.status = 'PENDING' UNION ALL SELECT la.id, la.leave_no AS reportNo, 'LEAVE' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, la.days AS amount, NULL AS expenseType, la.reason AS description, la.status, la.create_time AS createTime FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON la.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE la.status = 'PENDING' UNION ALL SELECT oa.id, oa.overtime_no AS reportNo, 'OVERTIME' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, oa.hours AS amount, NULL AS expenseType, oa.reason AS description, oa.status, oa.create_time AS createTime FROM overtime_application oa LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON oa.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE oa.status = 'PENDING' ) t ORDER BY t.createTime DESC

SELECT er.id, er.report_no AS reportNo, 'EXPENSE' AS businessType, ee.name AS empName, sd.dept_name AS deptName, er.total_amount AS amount, er.expense_type AS expenseType, er.description, er.status, er.create_time AS createTime FROM expense_report er LEFT JOIN emp_employee ee ON er.emp_id = ee.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept sd ON ee.dept_id = sd.id WHERE er.status = 'MANAGER_APPROVED' ORDER BY er.create_time DESC
